session_note: S46 — BUG-CRITICAL-5 joiner-experience parity stack. User-reported regression from S45 2-peer smoke (lobby Begin Match) plus 4 NEW bugs surfaced once gameplay started: Sym A (asymmetric LMB-place), Sym B (asymmetric pickup visual), Sym C (joiner can't self-bond), Sym D (cross-player bonding — user-confirmed spec deletion to color-segregated), Sym E (score display collision). User also confirmed Sym F territorial repulsion (NEW mechanic) deferred to S47. User approved Playwright 2-browser E2E harness to stop the regression-session pattern (S43→S44→S45→S46). Full tier PDR — Council R1+R2 + PRIME-AUDIT + CHECK Triumvirate. Phase A.0 instrumentation (host-side diagnostic strip) already SHIPPED via commit 426f6d0 — confirmed lobby flow worked on hard-refresh; user advanced to PLAYING and discovered the next regression layer.
council_invoked: Council R1 grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning + gemini-2.5-pro parallel COMPLETE. Grok REJECT (6 challenges + 5-row risk register + 6-bullet alternative + REJECT verdict — main objections P2 host re-validation missing exploit + P4 underspecified + Playwright vs lightweight alternatives). Gemini REVISE (5-score quality scorecard tech=4 others=5 + 8 findings + 3 creative + per-priority verdict — main objections P4 speculative BLOCKER + P7 missing Sym B/C coverage + TDD enforcement). R2 Synthesis: 16-row Battle Ledger (C1-C16) — 11 ADOPT, 1 ADOPT-LITE, 1 MERGE, 1 REJECT-LITE, 2 DEFER, 1 REJECT. Final verdict MEDIUM proceed-with-revised-scope. Real API spend: Grok ~$0.01 + Gemini-2.5-pro ~$0.04 = ~$0.05.
active_pdr: Inline session-state.json + chat. Will archive to .claude/plans/IN-PROGRESS_S46_BUG-CRITICAL-5_*.md after P10 closeout.
active_council_battle_ledger: 16 rows. ADOPTED: C1 P4 verification-first, C2 P5 3-hypothesis prelude, C3 bundle measurement gate, C4 host re-validation of PICKUP_SPARK.pos (HIGH-RISK exploit fix), C5 placerColor invariant DEV check, C6 harness cursor timing assertions, C10 P7 all-5-syms coverage, C11 TDD-style assertions-before-fixes, C12 mandatory pos field, C13 client-side prediction, C14 protocol docs update. ADOPT-LITE: C11 TDD. MERGE: C8 into C1. REJECT-LITE: C7 differential audit (carry-forward), C15 N>=2 peer support. DEFER: C16 audio + progress bar. REJECT: C9 Node WebRTC polyfill (defeats purpose).
active_prime_audit: 7 deltas: Δ1 host re-validation load-bearing for P2 (canvas bounds + reach plausibility + spawner-zone re-check), Δ2 TDD enforcement is new protocol, Δ3 P4 verification-only by default, Δ4 P5 3-hypothesis prelude before code, Δ5 bundle measurement gate (abort harness if Playwright spills to prod bundle), Δ6 PICKUP_SPARK.pos mandatory = BREAKING protocol change, Δ7 placerColor DEV invariant + protocol.ts JSDoc + LOCKED §13.X net-protocol amendment.
